Rivervale: Wibble Bramblebush at the lake piers house.
____________________________
Iven's EverQuest Archive
▲ Page top
Macro to level up Bind Wounds
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2021 at 1:57 PM Rating: Decent
Nenyagumba
View User Forum
Scholar
210 posts
Buy about 1000 bandages

ctrl A and Left click to select Bind Wound in the first key on the upper left
create a social key, call it Bandage
fill out each of the 5 lines like this:

/pause 120, /doability 1
/pause 120, /doability 1
/pause 120, /doability 1
/pause 120, /doability 1
/vt %t 008

Assign a hotkey for your social macro
Select your target for binding wounds
Press hotkey

You and your target should hear a laugh at the end of the macro, which will prompt you to start the macro again.

Edited, Feb 26th 2021 12:57pm by Nenyagumba
▲ Page top
Crescent Reach
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2010 at 3:40 PM Rating: Decent
Pley
11 posts
Sold by Merchant Odimari near Halima, the Vegetable Supplies vendor in the second room on the right when you enter the city of Crescent Reach.

Edited, Apr 23rd 2010 5:41pm by Pley

# Sep 25 2005 at 8:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Bandages cost 0 plat 0 gold 6 silver 5 copper sold by Ghul Rustem on the dock in South Qeynos (buyer level 2 human female monk with 143 charisma) I have verified its location on this vendor 4 times in the last two weeks and we had a large patch that reset everything on vendors during that same two weeks...
I have sold bandages in bazaar for 1 gold...


Edited, Sun Sep 25 10:06:23 2005
